metadata.title: Do You Really Want To Hurt Me
metadata.lyrics:
[00:01.89] Give me time to realise my crime
[00:13.17] Let me love and steal
[00:19.13] 
[00:23.28] I have danced inside your eyes
[00:34.68] How can I be real?
[00:40.06] 
[00:46.40] Do you really want to hurt me?
[00:51.13] Do you really want to make me cry?
[00:55.97] Precious kisses, words that burn me
[01:00.86] Lovers never ask you why
[01:05.46] In my heart, the fire's burning
[01:10.11] Choose my colour, find a star
[01:14.84] Precious people always tell me
[01:19.72] That's a step, a step too far
[01:24.67] Do you really want to hurt me?
[01:29.21] Do you really want to make me cry?
[01:34.05] Do you really want to hurt me?
[01:39.18] Do you really want to make me cry?
[01:43.31] 
[01:56.73] Words are few, I have spoken
[02:01.79] I could waste a thousand years
[02:06.05] Wrapped in sorrow, words are token
[02:11.06] Come inside and catch my tears
[02:15.91] You've been talking, but believe me
[02:20.68] If it's true, you do not know
[02:25.37] This boy loves without a reason
[02:30.20] I'm prepared to let you go
[02:34.31] If it's love you want from me
[02:38.80] Then take it away
[02:43.82] Everything's not what you see
[02:48.49] It's over again
[02:54.06] Do you really want to hurt me?
[02:58.72] Do you really want to make me cry?
[03:03.63] Do you really want to hurt me?
[03:08.15] Do you really want to make me cry?
[03:11.82] 
[03:40.50] Do you really want to hurt me?
[03:45.21] Do you really want to make me cry?
[03:50.14] Do you really want to hurt me?
[03:54.70] Do you really want to make me cry
[03:58.75] 
[04:03.14] Do you really want to hurt me?
[04:05.84] 
[04:07.92] Do you really want to make me cry?
